description:
Under `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → Practical backlog summary Tier 1 temporal reasoning overhaul.

Teach the observer/formatter flow to normalize phrases like `tomorrow`, `next Friday`, `last week`, and similar references into absolute dates or ranges when confidence is high, while preserving uncertainty for ambiguous phrases instead of inventing precise dates.
title: Normalize relative time phrases into absolute or ranged anchors without fake precision
